title: Launch readiness blockers
summary: 광고 집행과 실제 사용자 모집 전에 legal/trust/SEO, HOME hydration, guest console noise, security headers, FoodSafety mixed-content, PostCSS audit blocker를 release-hotfix workpack으로 닫는다.
goal: 사용자 유입 전 production에서 신뢰, 첫 렌더 안정성, 기본 보안 헤더, mixed-content, dependency audit 차단 이슈를 제거한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not use Claude for planning, review, authority, or closeout
owners.codex: stage1 docs, implementation, independent review sessions, authority sessions, final closeout, and launch evidence aggregation

dependencies: Track 0 real legal/operator facts before PR1 production merge
out_of_scope: Legal advice or legal adequacy guarantee by Codex
open_questions: Track 0 real operator/legal facts must be supplied before PR1 can production merge.
If CSP breaks preview flows, split PR3 into PR3a non-CSP headers and PR3b CSP baseline.
notes: Stage 1 docs branch opened by Codex per explicit user instruction. This release-hotfix is allowed to proceed before earlier in-progress slices because fake contact/legal 404, hydration/console errors, missing security headers, FoodSafety mixed-content, and PostCSS audit failure directly block ads and deployment. Claude is forbidden; review, authority, final authority, and closeout must be handled by separate Codex sessions.
